## Summary



## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature (new agent, new guide, new script)
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix or correction
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, scripts, templates, config

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] Content aligns with [`MANIFESTO.md`](../MANIFESTO.md) principles
- [ ] New agent files follow the frontmatter schema in [`.github/agents/AGENTS.md`](agents/AGENTS.md)
- [ ] New scripts have a module docstring and are listed in [`scripts/README.md`](../scripts/README.md)
- [ ] New docs are linked from the relevant index or guide
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data included
